snps.effect_template: HLA-DRB1 region. Major MHC risk locus for systemic lupus erythematosus.
PTPN22 R620W. Shared autoimmune susceptibility variant.
HLA-DR region risk variant for systemic lupus erythematosus.
STAT4 signal transducer. Interferon pathway component associated with SLE susceptibility.
IRF5 interferon regulatory factor. Innate immune response involvement in SLE pathogenesis.
ITGAM integrin alpha M. Immune cell adhesion and migration in SLE.
TNFAIP3 TNF-alpha induced protein 3. NF-kappa B signaling regulation in autoimmunity.
BLK B lymphoid tyrosine kinase. B cell development and activation in SLE.

recommendation_template: Sun protection is critical (UV can trigger flares). Avoid smoking. Regular monitoring of kidney function and blood counts if at elevated risk.

studies.title: Genome-wide association study in systemic lupus erythematosus
studies.finding: HLA region and PTPN22 confirmed as major SLE risk loci

studies.title: Genome-wide association study in systemic lupus erythematosus
studies.finding: Multiple loci identified including STAT4, IRF5, ITGAM, TNFAIP3, and BLK as SLE susceptibility genes
